hero.title: Hi, I'm Mohammed 👋
hero.description: Senior Software Engineer specialized in frontend development using React, Next.js, and TypeScript, with full-stack capabilities, strong product design awareness, and practical AI-powered delivery workflows.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Ask my AI assistant about what you want...

stack.title: Tech Stack
stack.description: Some of the technologies I use most often to design, build, and ship reliable products. Select any item to see how I apply it in real projects.

react.description:
React is one of my core technologies for building maintainable, production-ready interfaces at scale.
- Build reusable component systems with clean, scalable architecture and clear separation of concerns.
- Create reusable custom hooks for shared business logic, state orchestration, and side-effect handling.
- Consume generated API hooks/functions from Swagger/OpenAPI clients to speed up UI integration and reduce boilerplate.
- Use performance-focused patterns like virtualization, memoization, and render optimization in data-heavy screens.
- Develop generic, maintainable form workflows for large and complex forms.
- Apply accessibility-first patterns for keyboard support, focus management, and semantic UI behavior.
- Structure UI features to remain easy to test, refactor, and evolve over time.

nextjs.description:
Next.js is my primary framework for full-stack React delivery with strong performance and SEO.
- Architect full-stack applications with App Router, nested layouts, and clear server/client boundaries.
- Apply SSR, SSG, and caching strategies to improve performance, SEO, and perceived load time.
- Build server actions, route handlers, and secure API flows for production features.
- Optimize loading and rendering with streaming, code splitting, and route-level tuning.
- Implement localization, metadata strategy, and sitemap/robots setup for discoverability.
- Enforce maintainable project structure for long-term team scalability.

typescript.description:
TypeScript is a key part of my projects for maintainability, safety, and long-term scalability.
- Generate strongly typed API models and function contracts from Swagger/OpenAPI specs to keep backend/frontend contracts aligned.
- Design custom utility types and generic abstractions for scalable APIs and reusable modules.
- Enforce safer domain models and contracts across frontend and backend layers.
- Improve maintainability with strict typing for forms, data fetching, and state logic.
- Reduce runtime issues by catching edge cases early during development.
- Standardize shared types to keep feature teams aligned and reduce integration mistakes.
- Use type-driven refactoring to evolve systems confidently with fewer regressions.

node.description:
Node.js is my foundation for building backend services and integrations for modern product teams.
- Build scalable backend services and modular API architectures.
- Develop REST and real-time endpoints using Express and NestJS patterns.
- Implement validation, authentication, and structured error handling for reliability.
- Integrate background jobs and service-to-service workflows for production systems.
- Design database access layers and query flows with clear domain boundaries.
- Improve observability with structured logging and practical monitoring hooks.

docker.description:
Docker has been essential for keeping development and deployment environments consistent across teams and projects.
- Standardize local and CI environments to reduce machine-specific issues.
- Use Docker Compose for multi-service setups across app, database, and supporting tools.
- Create lean images and predictable runtime configurations for deployments.
- Improve onboarding by providing consistent development containers and scripts.
- Reproduce production-like behavior early to reduce release surprises.
- Streamline team collaboration with shared container-based workflows.

ai.description:
I use AI as a force multiplier to accelerate delivery while preserving quality and engineering standards.
- Use AI to boost development speed without compromising quality, architecture, or review standards.
- Create practical prompt and instruction file patterns for repeatable engineering output.
- Build reusable skills/workflows used across multiple projects for maintainability.
- Integrate AI features with evaluation-driven checks before shipping to production.
- Apply AI assistance for refactoring, test drafting, and documentation while keeping human validation in control.
- Treat AI outputs as a productivity layer, not a substitute for engineering judgment.
- Actively use multiple AI tools including GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex across different stages of development.

flutter.description:
Flutter has been part of my stack for projects that needed fast, consistent cross-platform mobile delivery.
- Build cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android from a shared codebase.
- Structure apps with maintainable state and feature modules for long-term growth.
- Integrate APIs, form flows, and platform capabilities with production-ready practices.
- Optimize UI responsiveness and release workflows for stable mobile delivery.
- Build reusable UI primitives to keep product behavior consistent across screens.
- Maintain clean architecture boundaries for easier testing and long-term maintainability.

vue.description:
Vue has been effective in teams and products that benefit from its lightweight, composable architecture.
- Build Vue 3 applications with the Composition API and reusable composables.
- Organize feature modules with clean state management and predictable data flow.
- Develop maintainable UI systems for dashboards and business-facing tools.
- Improve developer experience with typed patterns and scalable project structure.
- Design components and composables that keep logic modular and easy to reuse.
- Maintain clear conventions that support faster onboarding and smoother collaboration.

briefs.cnhiProjects:
Developed a set of Council of National Health Insurance (CNHI) services within the Seha ecosystem and led the team responsible for delivering them.
- Provider Portal: Connected healthcare providers (hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, and others) with CNHI for registration, join requests, data updates, application tracking, and officer-side review and onboarding management.
- Eligibility Engine: Enabled real-time coverage verification using ID number and date of birth, including specialized checks such as traffic-accident eligibility.
- Referral Distribution: Digitized referral distribution, acceptance, validation, assignment confirmation, and patient-arrival tracking across TPAs and healthcare facilities using a role-based workflow.
- Health Benefit Packages (HBP): Provided a governed workspace to browse, edit, clone, and assign insurance benefit packages to specific beneficiary segments.
- Shared Common Components: Developed reusable components used across all CNHI projects to improve consistency and maintainability.
- Internal Enablement Tools: Built tools that facilitated testing and streamlined recurring workflows for common operational tasks.
briefs.digitalTwin: Contributed to building the Digital Twin feature inside Sehaty (صحتي), Saudi Arabia's national citizen health platform. The feature constructs a virtual health model of the user derived from their personal data, medical history, and clinical records, estimating biological age, assessing obesity levels, surfacing diagnoses, and generating personalized health insights to empower users with a deeper understanding of their own health.
briefs.capacityDemand: Contributed to building the Capacity and Demand application on Hulool, a healthcare planning and decision-support platform designed to help leaders compare current service supply across regions (hospitals, PHCs, OPDs, urgent care, and halfway homes) against population and demand drivers such as demographics, tourism, referral flows, and health statistics. It supports identifying service gaps, prioritizing investment areas, tracking future projects and their expected impact, and enabling evidence-based decisions for resource allocation, expansion planning, and operational optimization.
briefs.openData: Contributed to the Open Data platform for the Saudi Ministry of Health, with a primary focus on rebuilding the admin panel to improve usability, structure, and maintainability. The work supported more efficient content and dataset management workflows and helped make public health data publishing more consistent and reliable.
briefs.rzerve: Contributed to Rzerve, a booking SaaS product focused on helping businesses manage reservations and booking operations in a streamlined, scalable workflow. Contributed to core product capabilities using Vue, Nuxt, and SurrealDB, and also took part in managerial responsibilities and business decisions that shaped execution priorities and product direction.
briefs.masroof: Architected and developed a comprehensive digital platform for school canteen management and digitization that connects suppliers and specialists. Features include a school management dashboard, parent mobile application, and electronic bracelet for students. Successfully transformed the entire operational process by streamlining purchase and payment workflows while reducing paper-based cash transactions, contributing to the creation of smart and secure school environments.
briefs.ktMessenger: Architected a secure, enterprise-grade messaging platform with end-to-end encryption protocols and rich multimedia support. Implemented advanced security features ensuring complete message privacy while maintaining seamless real-time communication and media exchange capabilities.
briefs.corners: Contributed to a high-traffic food delivery platform by developing cross-platform UI components for iOS and Android. Led critical refactoring initiatives to improve code maintainability and resolved complex bugs, enhancing overall application stability and user experience.
briefs.atHomeDoc: Architected a sophisticated microservices-based ERP system with dynamic module capabilities. Pioneered a data-driven UI framework that dynamically renders role-based interfaces through configuration objects, enabling seamless integration between frontend widgets and backend services. This architecture significantly reduced development time for new features while maintaining enterprise-level security and scalability.
briefs.macQueen: Delivered comprehensive full-stack contributions to a high-scale hotel booking platform across mobile and web channels. Developed production-ready React Native screens for iOS and Android while orchestrating strategic refactoring efforts to optimize code quality and maintainability across the entire technology stack.
briefs.gebhaly: Engineered critical customer-facing features for a large-scale e-commerce platform, including content management systems, promotional pages, and customer support interfaces. Led the development of responsive email templates and spearheaded the creation of the company's Chrome extension, delivering enhanced user engagement and shopping convenience across multiple touchpoints.
briefs.egParcelExpress: Architected and delivered a complete enterprise-grade international shipping platform from ground up using Next.js. Owned the entire client-side architecture, implementing complex shipping logistics workflows, real-time tracking interfaces, and seamless user experiences for global shipping operations.
briefs.lookMeUp: Engineered a sophisticated search engine with custom web crawling and indexing algorithms processing over 5,000 pages. Collaborated cross-functionally to build both backend distributed systems for content processing and intuitive frontend interfaces, implementing ranking algorithms and query optimization for efficient information retrieval.
briefs.iziHandmade: Independently architected and delivered a full-stack e-commerce platform with comprehensive role-based access control and multi-provider authentication. Implemented secure end-to-end solutions featuring OAuth integration with Facebook and Google, advanced admin capabilities for inventory management, and granular permission systems across both client and server layers.
briefs.egySchools: Developed a comprehensive school management ecosystem during professional internship with Datatec, integrating real-time notifications, transportation tracking, and academic progress monitoring. Engineered cross-platform solutions with Flutter mobile apps for students, parents, and drivers, alongside a React.js admin dashboard for staff operations. Implemented complex CRUD workflows managing users, routes, schedules, and educational milestones, creating a unified platform enhancing school-family communication.
briefs.spotifyClone: Collaborated within a five-member team to build a sophisticated music streaming platform replicating Spotify's core functionality. Architected state management solutions using Redux, implemented complex search algorithms, and developed user-centric features including profile management and help systems, ensuring seamless navigation and optimal performance.
briefs.santaGame: Engineered a game using Entity Component System (ECS) architecture in collaboration with a four-member team. Owned the design and implementation of core game logic and collision detection systems, leveraging OpenGL for rendering while maintaining clean separation of concerns through architectural patterns.
briefs.gradesAutofiller: Developed an intelligent automated grading system utilizing computer vision and image processing algorithms to recognize and process bubble sheet examinations. Implemented advanced OpenCV techniques for accurate mark detection, optical character recognition, and automated grade calculation, significantly reducing manual grading overhead.
briefs.harvardProcessor: Architected and implemented a Harvard-based processor adhering to RISC principles in a collaborative four-member team. Designed the complete instruction pipeline, memory hierarchy, and control unit using VHDL, delivering a functional processor demonstrating deep understanding of computer architecture fundamentals.
briefs.fontClassifier: Developed a machine learning solution for handwritten font classification in collaboration with a four-member team. Implemented feature extraction pipelines, trained and optimized classification models using scikit-learn, and employed computer vision techniques to achieve high-accuracy font recognition from handwritten samples.
briefs.srp: Implemented a Selective Repeat Protocol (SRP) simulation demonstrating advanced understanding of reliable data transmission mechanisms. Modeled network behavior, packet loss scenarios, and acknowledgment strategies using OMNeT++ framework, validating protocol efficiency through comprehensive testing and performance analysis.
